title: epipactis viridiflora subsp. pollinensis
intro: Epipactis viridiflora subsp. pollinensis is a subspecies of orchid native to Europe, characterized by its greenish-yellow flowers and unique growth habits. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Epipactis viridiflora subsp. pollinensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and provide protection against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or infused in tea, and it is also used in some traditional remedies to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of allergies.
